sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Immuron (ASX:IMC) Strengthens Growth Story with IMM-529 Advancing to Phase 2
feed.summary: Immuron (ASX:IMC) is strengthening its growth profile as its drug candidate IMM-529 progresses to Phase 2 clinical trials for recurrent Clostridioides difficile infection (CDI) after receiving FDA approval. The company is actively seeking a partner to advance IMM-529, which uses a differentiated three-target mechanism, while also reporting strong sales growth across its commercial gastrointestinal health products. This dual focus on pipeline development and commercial performance positions IMM-529 as a key value driver, targeting a significant market opportunity in CDI with sales up 16% in the recent quarter.

feed.title: Insmed rises on late-stage trial results for Arikayce for lung infection
feed.summary: This article is severely truncated and contains no content beyond the title. It indicates that Insmed's stock rose due to positive late-stage trial results for its drug Arikayce, used to treat lung infections. No further details are available.

feed.title: Paycom Software (PAYC) to Release Quarterly Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Paycom Software (PAYC) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings after market close on Wednesday, May 6th, with analysts forecasting earnings of $2.93 per share and revenue of $565.0830 million. The company recently reported Q4 earnings of $2.45 per share, slightly exceeding estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.375. Institutional investors have adjusted their holdings, and analysts have issued mixed ratings with an average "Hold" rating and a consensus price target of $168.79.

feed.title: Kestra Private Wealth Services LLC Has $5.85 Million Position in Williams Companies, Inc. (The) $WMB

Despite insider divestment, analyst sentiment remains positive, with a consensus "Buy" rating and an average price target of $78.60, alongside an announced quarterly dividend of $0.525.

feed.title: Biogen posts Q1 beat, trims earnings outlook (BIIB:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Biogen (BIIB) reported first-quarter results that surpassed analyst estimates. However, the company revised its full-year earnings forecast downwards, attributing the adjustment to costs associated with its business development activities aimed at supporting its growth strategy. Biogen is an Alzheimer's drug developer.

feed.title: Meta Platforms will report earnings today 🗽What will social media giant show?
feed.summary: Meta Platforms (META.US) is scheduled to report its Q1 2026 earnings, with investor focus primarily on CAPEX, AI monetization pace, and future guidance. Analysts anticipate strong revenue and EPS growth, largely driven by AI-driven advertising efficiency. The company's continued aggressive investment in AI infrastructure will be a key signal for the broader AI market.

feed.title: At US$601, Is IES Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:IESC) Worth Looking At Closely?

According to Simply Wall St's analysis, its price-to-earnings ratio of 35.34x is slightly below the industry average, suggesting a reasonable valuation. The company also shows a positive outlook with profit expected to grow by 29% over the next couple of years.

Analysts currently rate the stock as "Hold" with a consensus target price of $112.21.

While Las Vegas Sands is projected to grow slower than the broader industry, the overall sentiment concerning the company's prospects remains largely stable.

feed.title: DTE Energy Company $DTE Shares Sold by Pictet Asset Management Holding SA
feed.summary: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA reduced its stake in DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) by 6.0% in Q4, selling 37,966 shares and retaining 595,971 shares valued at $76.9 million. The company recently reported Q1 earnings per share of $1.65, beating expectations, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.165 per share. DTE Energy is seeking a $474 million electric rate increase but plans a two-year pause on future hikes, while facing regulatory scrutiny from the Michigan Attorney General.

feed.title: 11 Best Dollar Tree Kitchen New Arrivals Hitting Shelves This Week
feed.summary: Dollar Tree is introducing 11 new kitchen arrivals this week, offering budget-friendly options ranging from Anthropologie dupes to seasonal decor. Shoppers can find items like fruit-patterned glasses, lemon-printed plates, sunflower placemats, and patriotic tumblers, with most items priced at $1.25 in-store or $1.50 online, and some up to $5. The article highlights customer favorites and practical finds for kitchen and dining needs.

feed.title: Texas solar deal targets 43% of Graphic Packaging's U.S., Canada electricity
feed.summary: Graphic Packaging Holding Company (GPK) has signed a 250-megawatt virtual power purchase agreement (VPPA) with NextEra Energy Resources for a solar plant in West Texas. This agreement is expected to cover approximately 43% of Graphic Packaging's 2025 electricity usage in the U.S. and Canada, increasing its global purchased renewable electricity to about 49%. The deal significantly advances Graphic Packaging's sustainability goals, aiming to reduce global Scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions by about 20% from a 2021 baseline.

feed.title: More than 100M farm acres sit inside Mosaic's 2030 plan
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE: MOS) has announced new global 2030 sustainability targets focusing on People, Earth, and Innovation. Key goals include improving safety, advancing water management, planning for decarbonization, promoting soil health on over 100 million acres, and beneficially reusing tailings and process materials. Mosaic will report its progress annually, building on past achievements such as contributing $250 million to communities and promoting 4R practices on over 16 million acres.

feed.title: Humana Profit Falls as Lower Medicare Ratings Hurt Bonuses
feed.summary: Humana reported a decrease in its first-quarter profit, attributing the decline to lower Medicare Advantage Star Ratings for 2026, which negatively impacted bonuses. Despite this, the company maintained its full-year adjusted earnings guidance of at least $9 per share. Net income fell to $9.83 a share from $10.30 a share in the previous year.

feed.title: Capital One Financial Corporation $COF Shares Sold by Pictet Asset Management Holding SA
feed.summary: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA reduced its stake in Capital One Financial by 10.1% in Q4 2025, selling 41,123 shares. Despite a Q1 2026 earnings miss and a $425 million settlement, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $258.86. Institutional investors own nearly 90% of the company's stock, while corporate insiders have sold shares totaling over $9.7 million in the last three months.

feed.title: GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) posts Q1 2026 results and lowers profit outlook
feed.summary: GE HealthCare reported mixed first-quarter 2026 results, with revenue up 7.4% to $5.1 billion, but net income falling to $389 million. The company reaffirms its full-year 2026 organic revenue growth guidance of 3.0% to 4.0% but has reduced its profitability outlook due to increased inflation, particularly in memory chips, oil, and freight costs. Despite these challenges, GE HealthCare aims to offset over half of the inflation impact through price and cost actions and expects mid- to high-single-digit Adjusted EPS growth.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Sells 5,113,037 Shares of Exelon Corporation $EXC
feed.summary: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA has significantly reduced its stake in Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) by 71.7%, selling over 5.1 million shares in the fourth quarter, now holding 0.20% of the company. Despite this sale, institutional investors collectively own 80.92% of Exelon, and analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $50.44. Exelon also reported beating Q4 earnings estimates, declaring a quarterly dividend of $0.42, and providing FY2026 EPS guidance of $2.81–$2.91.

feed.title: UBS Group AG Has $212.83 Million Stake in Snap-On Incorporated $SNA

The article details Snap-On's financial performance, recent dividend announcement, and updated analyst ratings, reflecting a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: GE HealthCare's Q1 revenue tops estimates at $5.1B
feed.summary: GE HealthCare reported first-quarter revenue of $5.1 billion, surpassing analyst estimates. This performance indicates a strong start to the year for the medical technology company.

feed.title: Energy Stock Showdown: NextEra or Duke Energy -- Which One Wins Right Now?
feed.summary: This article compares NextEra Energy (NEE) and Duke Energy (DUK), two diversified energy stocks, to help investors decide which is a better fit for their portfolio. NextEra is highlighted for its stock price appreciation potential and unique regulated and non-regulated business model, including a growing nuclear fleet and renewable investments. Duke Energy is presented as a reliable income generator with a higher dividend yield and a long history of payments, catering to more conservative investors.

feed.title: GE HealthCare combines its two biggest businesses into a $14.6B imaging arm
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has announced a strategic reorganization, merging its Imaging and Advanced Visualization Solutions segments into a new $14.6 billion Advanced Imaging Solutions (AIS) unit. Phil Rackliffe has been appointed CEO of AIS, and Catherine Estrampes will lead Global Markets as Chief Commercial and Growth Officer. These changes aim to streamline operations, accelerate innovation, and enhance the company's precision care strategy by creating a more integrated imaging ecosystem.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker beats estimates on revenue growth By Investing.com
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) reported strong first-quarter results, exceeding analyst expectations for both adjusted earnings per share and revenue. The company posted adjusted EPS of $0.80 on revenue of $3.85 billion, driven by higher pricing and favorable currency impacts. Stanley Black & Decker also reaffirmed its full-year 2026 adjusted EPS guidance and completed the sale of its Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing business, using the proceeds to reduce debt.

feed.title: Humana reaffirms annual adjusted profit forecast, shares drop
feed.summary: Humana reaffirmed its annual adjusted profit forecast despite beating quarterly earnings estimates, a performance driven by lower-than-expected medical service spending. However, its shares dropped by 4.45% before the bell. The company lowered its reported profit forecast due to anticipated year-over-year decline from Medicare Star Ratings, even as it exceeded analysts' adjusted profit per share expectations.

feed.title: ExxonMobil Corporation $XOM Shares Purchased by Sanctuary Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Sanctuary Advisors LLC increased its stake in ExxonMobil Corporation (XOM) by 2.3% in Q4, acquiring an additional 23,668 shares, bringing their total to 1,048,409 shares valued at approximately $126.17 million. This makes XOM their 20th largest holding. The article highlights recent analyst upgrades, ExxonMobil's Q4 earnings beat, and its dividend, alongside neutral and negative sentiments regarding its stock performance and a recent lawsuit.

feed.title: News Corp (NASDAQ: NWSA) updates $1B buyback and ASX disclosures
feed.summary: News Corporation filed an 8-K report detailing updates to its ongoing US$1 billion share repurchase program for its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. The company's ASX notifications indicate cumulative buybacks for both classes of securities, including specific daily repurchases made on April 28, 2026, totaling over $2.7 million. News Corp clarified that no ASX-listed CDIs will be repurchased as part of this program.

feed.title: JPMorgan (NYSE: JPM) prices uncapped digital barrier notes due May 20, 2031
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering Uncapped Digital Barrier Notes linked to the lesser performing of the S&P 500® and the Russell 2000®, with a Contingent Digital Return of at least 52.00%. These notes, guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., are expected to price around May 15, 2026, settle on May 20, 2026, and mature on May 20, 2031. They pay no interest, and principal repayment is contingent on index performance relative to a 75.00% barrier, exposing investors to potential principal loss.

feed.title: Cintas Corporation $CTAS Shares Sold by UBS Group AG
feed.summary: UBS Group AG reduced its stake in Cintas Corporation by 7.0% in the fourth quarter, selling 97,556 shares and holding 1,296,970 shares valued at approximately $243.9 million. Additionally, Cintas Director Ronald W. Tysoe sold 4,666 shares, decreasing his holdings by 17.21% to 22,448 shares. Cintas also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, with an annualized yield of around 1.0%.

feed.title: JPMorgan (NYSE: JPM) offers Autocallable Notes linked to AMAT stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Applied Materials, Inc. (AMAT) stock. These notes have a $10 principal amount, an approximate 18-month term, and an expected minimum contingent coupon rate of 19.25% per annum. The notes can be automatically called early if AMAT's closing price equals or exceeds its initial value, and repayment at maturity depends on AMAT's performance relative to a downside threshold, carrying significant risk of principal loss.

feed.title: HFND Stock Price | Unlimited HFND Multi-Strategy Return Tracker ETF
feed.summary: This article provides detailed information about the Unlimited HFND Multi-Strategy Return Tracker ETF (HFND), including its current stock price, trading exchange, and key financial metrics. It offers insights into the ETF's holdings, performance, expense ratio, dividend yield, and company profile. The article also includes technical analysis signals for HFND.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) lifts 2026 EPS outlook after $1.8B CAM sale
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker reported first-quarter 2026 net sales of $3.85 billion, a 3% increase year-over-year, and completed the sale of Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing (CAM) for $1.8 billion, with most of the $1.6 billion net proceeds used to reduce debt. The company consequently raised its 2026 GAAP EPS guidance to $4.15–$5.35 while reaffirming adjusted EPS guidance of $4.90–$5.70, projecting significant year-over-year growth. Despite modest sales growth and some margin compression, the CAM divestiture is expected to strengthen the balance sheet and provide capital allocation flexibility for future share repurchases.

feed.title: iShares iBonds Dec 2035 Term Corporate ETF (IBCA) Institutional Ownership 2026
feed.summary: This article details the institutional ownership of the iShares iBonds Dec 2035 Term Corporate ETF (IBCA). As of April 28, 2026, 33.75% of IBCA's stock is owned by institutional investors, with Bogart Wealth LLC being the largest shareholder. Over the last 24 months, institutional investors, primarily Bogart Wealth LLC, have purchased a total of 578 shares, representing approximately $14.82K in transactions.

feed.title: Apellis deal and Q1 2026 results reshape Biogen (NASDAQ: BIIB) outlook
feed.summary: Biogen reported Q1 2026 revenue of $2.48 billion, a 2% increase year-over-year, with significantly higher GAAP and Non-GAAP diluted EPS. The company's growth products showed strong performance, and it announced a proposed acquisition of Apellis Pharmaceuticals, expected to boost its Non-GAAP diluted EPS compounded annual growth rate through the decade, alongside an agreement for felzartamab rights in Greater China. Biogen updated its full-year 2026 guidance, expecting Non-GAAP diluted EPS between $14.25 and $15.25, excluding the Apellis impact, and a mid-single-digit percentage decline in total revenue.

feed.title: Buffered Basket‑Linked Notes from GS Finance Corp. (NYSE: GS) due May 2028
feed.summary: GS Finance Corp. is offering buffered digital basket-linked notes due May 2028, guaranteed by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. These notes do not pay interest and their return at maturity depends on the performance of a weighted basket of five international indices. Investors face potential losses if the final basket level falls more than 10% below the initial level, with amplified losses applying below the buffer level.

feed.title: Citi reiterates Herc Holdings stock rating with $155 price target
feed.summary: Citi has reiterated a Buy rating on Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HRI) with a price target of $155.00, suggesting a significant upside from its current price. This endorsement follows Herc Holdings' strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, which significantly surpassed analyst expectations for both earnings per share and revenue. These positive developments highlight the company's robust performance in the equipment rental sector.

feed.title: Biogen posts Q1 revenue of $2.5B, surpasses estimates
feed.summary: Biogen announced first-quarter revenue of $2.5 billion, exceeding analyst estimates. This financial performance indicates a strong start to the year for the biotechnology company.

feed.title: Biogen surpasses estimates with Q1 revenue of $2.5B
feed.summary: Biogen reported Q1 revenue of $2.5 billion, exceeding analyst estimates. This performance indicates a strong start to the year for the pharmaceutical company.

feed.title: GSK posts Q1 beat and reaffirms outlook (GSK:NYSE)
feed.summary: GSK reported better-than-expected financials for Q1 2026, driven by strong sales in its HIV and cancer medicine portfolios. These gains successfully counterbalanced a decline in sales from its general medicines, including respiratory therapies. The report indicates a solid start to the first full quarter under the new CEO, Luke Miels.

feed.title: Going Into Earnings, Is Albemarle Stock a Buy, a Sell, or Fairly Valued?
feed.summary: Morningstar assesses Albemarle (ALB) ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report on May 6, considering it fairly valued with a 3-star rating and a $200 fair value estimate. Key watch points for the earnings include realized lithium prices, volume growth from new plants, and management's updated investment strategy following price increases. The company holds a narrow economic moat due to cost advantages in lithium and bromine production but faces high uncertainty from volatile lithium prices and political risks in Chile.

feed.title: State Street to Launch Tokenised Fund Servicing Capability From Luxembourg
feed.summary: State Street plans to launch a tokenized fund servicing capability from Luxembourg by the end of 2026, extending its existing fund administration, custody, and transfer agency services. This new service, delivered through the firm’s Digital Asset Platform, will support both traditional and digitally native fund structures under a unified operating model. Luxembourg was chosen for its established global funds ecosystem and supportive legal frameworks.
